description: Optional MCP server configurations for external knowledge base sources.

sharepoint.description: Ingest documents from a SharePoint document library.

confluence.description: Ingest Confluence pages as knowledge base sources.

s3.description: Ingest PDF documents stored in an S3 bucket.

notes: Set 'enabled: true' and configure env vars in your .env file to activate an MCP source.
Do NOT commit credentials to source control — use environment variables only.
Documents ingested via MCP are stored in data/documents/ and indexed in ChromaDB like any other PDF.
